political.s: Via parent company Unilever: FEC: $570K in executive political donations; partisan lean Republican +56 across 12 executive donors.

labor.s: Via parent company Unilever: 44 federal penalties totaling $38.1M since 2000 (Violation Tracker). Supply-chain signals: KnowTheChain 73/100; CHRB 19.5/26; TVPRA exposure; UK MS statement; AU MS statement.

charity.s: $60M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.09% of revenue).

environment.s: Via parent company Unilever: water pollution violation: $4.6M in federal penalties (Violation Tracker).

dei.s: Via parent company Unilever: HRC Corporate Equality Index: 100/100 — Equality 100 Leader (2025). Top-rated LGBTQ+ workplace policies, benefits, and culture. Bloomberg Gender-Equality Index member (2024) — transparent on female leadership, equal pay, inclusive culture. HRC Corporate Equality Index 100/100 (2025) — top-tier LGBTQ+ workplace equality rating.

animals.s: Via parent company Unilever: BBFAW 2024 Tier 2 — among leading multinationals on policy + reporting. CIWF Good Egg + Good Dairy Awards (Ben & Jerry's Caring Dairy programme). [BBFAW Tier 2 · CIWF Award]

privacy.s: Via parent company Unilever: CFPB consumer complaints: 70 on record (36 in past 12mo); 99% timely response rate.

wiki.extract: Pepsodent is an American brand of toothpaste with a minty flavor that is derived from sassafras. The brand was purchased by Unilever in 1942 and is still owned by the company outside of the United States and Canada. In 2003, Unilever sold the rights to the brand in the North American market to Church & Dwight.

health.s: Via parent company Unilever: 4 CPSC recalls on record; sample hazard: the controller of the freezer is incompatible with the unit and can overheat and.
